---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    theme: superhero
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "On this page"
    toc-depth: 3
---

<h2>Education</h2>

-  <div class="fw-semibold"><span class="text-primary">Teaching Assistant Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management,</span> UBC Faculty of Forestry, Vancouver, BC</div>
<div class="fst-italic text-muted text-end">*Completion: 2026*</div> 

<ul class="mt-2 mb-0">Capstone Project: Evaluating and comparing the performance of current VRI data and LiDAR-derived stand metrics across different geospatial features in UBC’s MKRF, BC. ( detail see "Project Content")</ul>

<br>

- <div class="fw-semibold"><span class="text-primary">Bachelor of Arts,</span> UBC Faculty of Arts, Vancouver, BC</div>
<div class="fst-italic text-muted text-end">*Completion: 2025*</div> 

<ul class="mt-2 mb-0">Specialization: Geography, Environment & Sustainability.</ul>



<br>
<br>



<h2>Awards & Honors</h2>

- Outstanding International Student Award of $10,000, UBC (2021)
- Faculty of Arts International Student Scholarship of $5,500.00, UBC (2023)
- Faculty of Arts International Student Scholarship of $5,000.00, UBC (2024)



<br>
<br>



<h2>Teaching Assistantships</h2>
- <div class="fw-semibold"><span class="text-primary">CHIN131/231 Teaching assistant,</span> UBC Department of Asian Studies, Vancouver, BC</div>   
  <div class="fst-italic text-muted text-end">*May 2024 – April 2025*</div>
    <ul class="mt-2 mb-0">
    <li>Attending weekly tutorial sessions. </li>
    <li>Contribute to the development and maintenance of the course web page; assist in editing text materials.</li>
    <li>Assisting with the devising and participating in team meetings and events.</li>
    <li>Review, correct, and comment on student work weekly; identify and report issues, including but not limited to academic misconduct, technical errors, and material omissions.</li>
    </ul>
    
<br>

- <div class="fw-semibold"><span class="text-primary">CHIN405 OER,</span> UBC Department of Asian Studies, Vancouver, BC</div>                 
  <div class="fst-italic text-muted text-end">*May 2024 – August 2024*</div>
    <ul class="mt-2 mb-0">
    <li>Assist in designing web pages to incorporate course/instructor requirements into the web design</li>
    <li>Modify, maintain, and update course webpages</li>
    <li>Create web page tutorials, including written instructions and video recordings</li>
    </ul>


<br>
<br>



<h2>Institutional Service</h2>

- <div class="fw-semibold"><span class="text-primary">Assorted Farm Tasks, UBC Farm volunteer program,</span> Vancouver, BC</div>              
<div class="fst-italic text-muted text-end">*May 2023 – June 2023*</div>
    <ul class="mt-2 mb-0">
    <li>Promote the understanding of various crops, process and join the routine tasks for the crop growth.</li>
    <li>Handle detailed, tedious, and energy-consuming work.</li>
    <li>Weed and harvest crops like strawberries, carrots, and lettuce.</li>
    </ul>
